regular season table|showteam=CAS}} == Challenge Cup == {{main|2026 Challenge Cup}} Castleford entered the [[2026 Challenge Cup]] in the third round, scheduled to be played in early February prior to the start of the Super League season. As a top flight club, they were guaranteed an away tie against non-Super League opposition.{{Cite web |last=Olawumi |first=Ben |date=18 November 2025 |title=2026 Challenge Cup round dates revealed in full as calendar takes shape |url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/2026-challenge-cup-round-dates-revealed |access-date=6 January 2026 |website=Love Rugby League}} In the third-round draw on 12 January, Castleford were selected to face the winners of the second-round tie between [[Doncaster R.L.F.C.|Doncaster]] and [[Newcastle Thunder]].{{Cite web |date=12 January 2026 |title=Betfred Challenge Cup Third Round Draw |url=https://www.rugby-league.com/article/64468/betfred-challenge-cup-third-round-draw |access-date=19 January 2026 |website=RFL}} They were drawn to play [[St Helens R.F.C.|St Helens]] at home in the fourth round.{{Cite web |date=9 February 2026 |title=Hull KR visit Huddersfield in Challenge Cup fourth round |url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/articles/crrx5l0dn4ko |access-date=20 February 2026 |website=BBC Sport}} {{rugbyleaguebox_collapsible |bg = ddffdd |round = Third round |date = Sat 7 February |time = 14:00 [[GMT]] |team1 = [[Doncaster R.L.F.C.|Doncaster]] {{leagueicon|Doncaster|16}} |score = {{0}}0–14 |team2 = {{leagueicon|Castleford|16}} Castleford Tigers |try1 = |goal1 = |drop1 = |sinbin1 = [[Titus Gwaze|Gwaze]] {{sin bin|36|46}} |sentoff1 = |try2 = [[Joe Stimson|Stimson]] {{try|23}}
